title: astragalus neurophyllus
intro: Astragalus neurophyllus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to the mountainous regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Astragalus neurophyllus are said to include improved immune function, reduced fatigue, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus neurophyllus is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to support overall well-being and boost vitality.
